scope.summary: Shared enemy composition forecast is now shown in Theater and Deployment briefings, using existing operation intel confidence/recon-effect labels.
scope.mobileQa: skipped: mobile is no longer a current target

observed.theaterMainBrief: 敵編成 群集+銃兵+突破体 / 敵情信頼中
sideOperationBriefExamples: 敵情 群集+銃兵+突破体 / 敵情信頼低
敵情 銃兵+群集+突破体 / 敵情信頼高
敵情 突破体+群集 / 敵情信頼高
observed.deploymentBrief: 敵編成 群集+銃兵+突破体 / 敵情信頼中

implemented: Added shared src/game/theater/enemyIntel.ts for enemy composition forecasts and confidence labels.
Army command recommendations now import the shared enemy-intel forecast instead of owning it in politicalCost.ts.
Theater main-battle briefing shows enemy composition and intel confidence.
Theater side-operation cards show enemy composition and intel confidence per operation.
Deployment briefing ledger shows enemy composition and intel confidence before battle start.
deferred: Recon-quality-specific uncertainty ranges for each enemy type.
Theater/Deployment display of likely wave timing and command-wave probability.
Explicit comparison between enemy intel and selected reserve doctrine.
